benchmark: Cluster D — torch-free world-model baselines vs the Path-A incumbent

corpus.honestBound: Hand-authored demo data, not mined model traces. It is realistic (each action is contrastive: success when the state supplies the precondition, failure when it does not) but it is a fixture, not evidence. It exists so the retrieval-floor and self-consistency baselines can be exercised deterministically in CI; it does not prove generalization and nothing here lets canClaimAGI flip.

retrieval_D2.name: D2 — retrieval-augmented transition predictor (kNN, abstains OOD)
retrieval_D2.interpretation: val accuracy 1.0 > 0.65 AND shift-degradation 0.0 <= 0.15: the retrieval floor does NOT collapse under shift. It abstains on 60% of shift queries (novel families are OOD) rather than confidently mispredicting — the validated retrieval-grounding posture, where the learned RSSM went shift-degenerate.

llm_wm_D1.name: D1 — LLM-as-world-model (in-context dynamics; self-consistency uncertainty)
llm_wm_D1.interpretation: In --fake CI mode the completer is a deterministic oracle: in-distribution queries give consistent samples (confident), novel families give disagreeing samples (D1 abstains, 60% of shift). This exercises the self-consistency signal (validated on SimpleQA) without a network; a live run injects a real temperature>0 completer. Borrows a pretrained prior instead of LEARNING dynamics from 25 traces.

synthetic25Corpus.note: 25-pair synthetic corpus: aced held-out then collapsed under shift (memorized, did not generalize) — the negative this cluster answers.

realTracesCorpus.note: 44 real DeepSeek traces, pass-skewed (0.955); both negatives fell in train so val/shift had positive_rate 1.0 — an always-positive baseline scores 1.0, so the promote is a canary defect, not learning.

verdict: Both baselines clear the held-out bar AND bound shift-degradation by ABSTAINING on novel OOD families instead of guessing — the failure mode the 25-pair RSSM exhibited. These are candidate baselines on a hand-authored fixture, NOT Level-3 evidence and NOT an AGI claim; the honest result is that retrieval/self-consistency degrade gracefully where learned dynamics collapsed.
